mapper.sql: id, warehouse_id, task_id, subtask_id, instruction_id, domain, device_id, command_type, idempotency_key, status, request_json, response_json, error_code, error_message, trace_id, correlation_id, started_at, ended_at, created_at, updated_at

select from wcs_command_execution WITH (NOLOCK)
select from wcs_command_execution
order by id desc

choose.when: select from wcs_command_execution WITH (NOLOCK) where warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and id = #{id}
choose.otherwise: select from wcs_command_execution where warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and id = #{id}

choose.when: select from wcs_command_execution WITH (NOLOCK) where warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}
choose.otherwise: select from wcs_command_execution where warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}

choose.when: insert into wcs_command_execution ( warehouse_id, task_id, subtask_id, instruction_id, domain, device_id, command_type, idempotency_key, status, request_json, response_json, error_code, error_message, trace_id, correlation_id, started_at, ended_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{warehouseId}, #{taskId}, #{subtaskId}, #{instructionId}, #{domain}, #{deviceId}, #{commandType}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{status}, #{requestJson}, #{responseJson}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{traceId}, #{correlationId}, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
choose.otherwise: insert into wcs_command_execution ( warehouse_id, task_id, subtask_id, instruction_id, domain, device_id, command_type, idempotency_key, status, request_json, response_json, error_code, error_message, trace_id, correlation_id, started_at, ended_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{warehouseId}, #{taskId}, #{subtaskId}, #{instructionId}, #{domain}, #{deviceId}, #{commandType}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{status}, #{requestJson}, #{responseJson}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{traceId}, #{correlationId}, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt}, now(), now() )

mapper.update:
update wcs_command_execution
task_id = #{taskId}, subtask_id = #{subtaskId}, instruction_id = #{instructionId}, domain = #{domain}, device_id = #{deviceId}, command_type = #{commandType}, status = #{status}, request_json = #{requestJson}, response_json = #{responseJson}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, trace_id = #{traceId}, correlation_id = #{correlationId}, started_at = #{startedAt}, ended_at = #{endedAt},
updated_at = GETDATE() updated_at = now()
where id = #{id} and warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}

update wcs_command_execution
status = #{status}, response_json = #{responseJson}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, ended_at = #{endedAt},
updated_at = GETDATE() updated_at = now()
where warehouse_id = #{wareHouseId} and id = #{id}
